markdownDescription: Boolean flag that indicates whether to store all the fields in your collection on Atlas Search or a Stored Source Object that specifies the fields to `include` or `exclude` from storage. If you omit this parameter, it defaults to `false`. To learn more, see [Define Stored Source Fields in Your Atlas Search Index](https://dochub.mongodb.org/core/stored-source-definition-fts).
description: Boolean flag that indicates whether to store the fields in your collection on Atlas Search or a Stored Source Object that specifies the fields to include or exclude from storage.

include.markdownDescription: List that contains the field names or dot-separated paths to the fields to store. By default, Atlas Search also stores the `_id` field.
include.description: List that contains the field names or paths to the fields to store.

items.errorMessage: Field name does not meet MongoDB field naming restrictions. Please see https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/core/document/#field-names .

exclude.markdownDescription: List that contains the field names or dot-separated paths to the fields to exclude from storage.
exclude.description: List that contains the field names or paths to the fields to exclude from storage.

items.errorMessage: Field name does not meet MongoDB field naming restrictions. Please see https://www.mongodb.com/docs/manual/core/document/#field-names .
